g.text: Strong preclinical evidence — every one still failed

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5b544e

g.text: The six case studies on the original rubric (mechanistic / cell / animal / PD). All scored near-maximal, all failed in humans — but the rubric never scored human genetics.

text.style: font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue'; text-anchor: start; fill: #938b82

g.text: Preclinical scores from Melissa Du's CASE_STUDIES.md rubric.
